resources.string: Restore
Seed Recovery Phrase
Please type in your 24-word secret recovery phrase in the correct order.
Next
The Secret Recovery Phrase

is a unique set of 24 words, appearing in a precise order. It can be used to gain full control of your funds from any device via any Zcash wallet app. Think of it as the master key to your wallet. It is stored in Zodl’s Advanced Settings.
The Wallet Birthday Height

is the block height (block # in the blockchain) at which your wallet was created. If you ever lose access to your Zodl app and need to recover your funds, providing the block height along with your recovery phrase can significantly speed up the process.
Estimate my block height
Decide how far Zodl should scan. Enter a date before your first received transaction. If you\’re not sure, choose an earlier date.
This word is not in the seed phrase dictionary. Please select the correct one from the suggestions.
If Tor is available in your region, we recommend enabling it for enhanced privacy during wallet restoration. This step is completely optional.
Routes your connection through the Tor network for enhanced anonymity and privacy protection.
Decide how far Zodl should resync. Enter a date before your first received transaction. If you\'re not sure, choose an earlier date.
Your wallet will be resynced from %1$s (%2$s blocks). Zodl will scan and recover all transactions made after the following block number.
Confirm Resync

Resync the current wallet without resetting the app. This can be used to troubleshoot issues that would normally require restoring your wallet like fixing your Keystone balance.\n\nUnless you specify otherwise below, Zodl will resync from the date displayed.
Unless you specify otherwise below, Zodl will resync from the date displayed.
Your wallet will be resynced from %1$s (%2$s blocks). Use the button below if you wish to change it.
Change
Resync Failed
Resync of the wallet couldn’t be finalized. Please try again or report an issue.
